description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OSW-OS-test that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and pull requests to master and develop branches. The workflow consists of two jobs: Find-packages and build-OSW. The Find-packages job checks out the repository and submodules, extracts languages and models from the repository, and outputs them as matrices. The build-OSW job depends on Find-packages, uses the extracted matrices to compile firmware for each language and model combination, and uploads the resulting firmware artifacts.
